query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN documentType = 'teacher_guide' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as teacher_guides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN extractedContent IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(extractedContent) > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_content,
  SUM(CASE WHEN extractedContent IS NULL OR LENGTH(extractedContent) < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_content
FROM referenceDocuments;
